Our Story

Welcome to Pacito's

Nestled in the heart of Makopo near the roundabout in Butha-Buthe, Pacito's is the go-to restaurant for bold, flavour-packed meals that keep customers coming back. From cheesy wood-fired pizzas to slow-cooked ribs and sticky BBQ wings — every dish is made with passion.

Whether you're settling in for a relaxed dine-in experience, grabbing a quick takeaway, or ordering delivery, Pacito's delivers flavour that truly slaps. Our warm, stylishly decorated space with a lush green wall feature makes it the perfect spot for dates, family meals, or catching up with friends.

Wood-Fired Pizza

Loaded with toppings, crispy & cheesy

BBQ Ribs & Wings

Slow-cooked, sticky glazed perfection

Craft Bar

Cocktails, milkshakes & mixed shots

Makopo, Butha-Buthe

Near the roundabout — easy to find

Our Specialities

Hot Meals

Every plate is a masterpiece. Here are some of our most-loved dishes.

Signature

Loaded Pizza

Stone-baked base piled high with meat, cheese and Pacito's secret sauce. Available in multiple sizes.

Best Seller Hot & Cheesy Small / Large
Fan Fave

BBQ Ribs Platter

Slow-cooked baby back ribs with smoky BBQ glaze, crispy fries and a fresh garden salad.

Slow-Cooked + Salad + Fries
Popular

Wings & Fries

Sticky glazed chicken wings with seasoned fries and a crisp cucumber salad. Finger-licking good.

Sticky Glaze + Salad + Fries
Must Try

Burger Combo

Crispy chicken burger stacked with fresh veggies, served alongside wings and seasoned golden fries.

Crispy Chicken + Wings + Fries
Trending

Club Sandwich Meal

Grilled club sandwich with wings, fries and a vibrant pink bubblegum milkshake. The full Pacito's experience.

Grilled + Milkshake + Fries
Takeaway

Box Meal Deal

Wings, fries, pizza slice and a wrap — all packed in a box. Perfect for takeaway or quick delivery orders.

Takeaway Delivery Great Value

Our People

Meet the Team

Behind every flavour-packed plate is a dedicated team who pour heart and soul into every dish. Our passionate staff bring the Pacito's spirit to life — from kitchen to table.

Dressed in their signature black Pacito's uniforms, our team is always ready to welcome you with a smile and serve you food that lives up to the name: Flavour That Slaps!!!

Reviews

What Customers Say

"

The pizza at Pacito's is absolutely unreal. The BBQ chicken pizza had the perfect crispy base and was loaded with toppings. Been back three times this month already!

TM
Teboho Mokoena
Butha-Buthe, Lesotho
"

The ribs and wings combo was incredible — so tender and the BBQ sauce is absolutely incredible. Loved the vibe inside, the green wall is such a cool touch. The milkshakes are a must-try!

NS
Nthatisi Sello
Maseru, Lesotho
"

Ordered a box meal for delivery and it arrived hot and packed perfectly. The Pineapple Berry Blitz cocktail from the bar is absolutely divine. 100% recommend Pacito's!

KL
Kamohelo Lerotholi
Butha-Buthe, Lesotho
